style_redesign.editorial_photography: Transform this photo into editorial photography style. Preserve the main subject, all people and faces, and the exact composition. Do not remove or add objects. Only modify: color palette (refined, magazine-like), lighting (controlled, professional), contrast and clarity. Output should look like a high-end magazine cover.
style_redesign.vintage_film: Transform this photo into vintage film style. Preserve the main subject, all people and faces, and the exact composition. Do not remove or add objects. Only modify: color palette (faded, film stock), subtle grain texture, soft lighting, nostalgic tone. Keep all content and framing identical.
style_redesign.travel_poster: Transform this photo into a travel poster style. Preserve the main subject, all people and faces, and the exact composition. Do not remove or add objects. Only modify: color palette (bold, poster-like), simplified lighting, flat illustration feel, texture. Content and composition must stay the same.
style_redesign.hand_drawn_illustration: Transform this photo into hand-drawn illustration style. Preserve the main subject, all people and faces, and the exact composition. Do not remove or add objects. Only modify: apply illustration texture and hand-drawn look, color palette, line work feel. Keep every element in the same position.
style_redesign.cinematic: Transform this photo with cinematic color grading. Preserve the main subject, all people and faces, and the exact composition. Do not remove or add objects. Only modify: color grading (film-like, teal/orange or mood-based), lighting depth, subtle vignette. Content must remain identical.
style_redesign.modern_magazine: Transform this photo into modern magazine style. Preserve the main subject, all people and faces, and the exact composition. Do not remove or add objects. Only modify: clean color palette, crisp lighting, modern editorial look, slight clarity. No cropping or content change.
